fixesApplied.description: Test page had zero iconSlug examples — iconSlug PHP rendering path was never exercised.
fixesApplied.fix: Added two new demo containers to the test page at the top: (1) 'IconPicker Slugs - All 12 Icons' — a wide-social-media block containing all 12 iconSlug variants (bluesky, facebook, facebook-alt, imdb, instagram, linkedin, pinterest, threads, tiktok, vimeo, x, youtube), no logoId; (2) 'IconPicker Slugs - Icons Only (showLabel=false)' — 4 items with iconSlug and showLabel=false to test icon-only display via resource SVGs. All 9 original variations preserved unchanged.

fixesApplied.description: iconSlug attribute in block.json had no default value, inconsistent with logoId which has default: null.
fixesApplied.fix: Added "default": null to iconSlug attribute in blocks/WideSocialMedia/WideSocialMediaItem/block.json for consistency.

filesModified.purpose: Added default: null to iconSlug attribute for consistency with logoId

syncStatus.notes: Root wrapper mismatch warnings are pre-existing and expected — BlockControls is a Gutenberg editor-only wrapper, not a frontend element. All other sync checks pass.

testPage.notes: Added 2 new demo containers with 16 iconSlug-based items (12 in all-icons container, 4 in showLabel=false container). Original 9 containers with 31 logoId items preserved. Total: 11 demo containers, 47 takt/wide-social-media-item instances.
